title: teucrium pulverulentum
intro: Teucrium pulverulentum, also known as powdered teucrium or small spotted germander, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which help to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. The health benefits of Teucrium pulverulentum include its ability to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to improve digestion and reduce stress levels. Teucrium pulverulentum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed for its medicinal and health benefits.
